blocks.content: System Operation (3)
Shirone finally halted his offensive.
While the parallel circuits alone may have reduced power, when combined to form a mansion, they could produce an amplification power that was incomparable to even a series configuration.
In addition, due to the nature of the three-dimensional circuit, the distribution pattern appears differently depending on the observation point.
Therefore, it was impossible to determine what the six magic circles that make up a specific mansion were.
It's similar to how drawing a square on a blank sheet with dots quickly becomes apparent, but trying to visualize it in three dimensions makes it impossible to distinguish anything.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: What do you think, Shirone? Can you avoid this too?
As soon as Dante finished speaking, six air-type magic circles moved, trapping Shirone within a Pressure Mansion.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ugh!
The moment Shirone felt the pressure on his spine, a bluish bolt of lightning began charging in the center of the Electric Mansion floating above Dante's head.
As the powerful electric beam was fired, the air where the electricity passed was completely burned, along with sharp crackling noise of electric charges colliding.
No matter where Shirone tried to evade, the attack followed.
This was because Photon Output from Photon Mansion was tracking Shirone's coordinates in real-time.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ah...

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It didn't feel like he was fighting a person. It was like battling a heavily armed warship equipped with numerous weapons.
Shirone rolled on the ground to dodge the Ice Spear plunging vertically towards him.
As the world spun around him, he heard a sizzling sound near the ground.
As he cast photonization and flipped his body, an Atomic Bomb exploded almost simultaneously.
The students were dumbfounded by Dante's overwhelming firepower.

blocks.speaker: Mark
blocks.content: My God... What kind of magic is that?

blocks.speaker: Mark
blocks.content: Mark also found it unbelievable.
Even if Pascal could process in parallel, the entire system was still controlled by the human brain.
Managing hundreds of magic circles was beyond human capability.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Nade, say something. Honestly, I don't understand.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: That's... called Automaton.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Automaton?

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: An automated mechanical device. It involves meshing several gears together, then moving the first gear. Then, the last gear will output a fixed value. It's a simple mechanism, but when this process scales to astronomical units, even very complex tasks become possible.
Like how Photon Output tracks Shirone's coordinates or how the mansions are rapidly switched.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ugh!
Shirone was experiencing the power of the Automaton firsthand.
No matter how he responded, the Automaton automatically calculated and countered his moves, making it an impregnable fortress.
Even though they were basic magics, the power they wielded, enhanced by the mansion, was anything but basic.
Dodging the bombardment as he rolled across the ground, Shirone hastily searched for Dante but couldn't see him, buried among hundreds of magic circles.
The magic circles floating all around felt like the gazes of a monstrous creature with hundreds of eyes.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ugh!
Shirone felt an eerie sensation and frantically fired Photon Cannon.
Automaton responded immediately.
As Lightning Cannon charged in Bolt Mansion fired, the blinding electricity etched a straight flash in the air, bursting Photon Cannons like balloons.
As Lightning Cannon grazed Shirone's side, that alone triggered anti-magic.
While Shirone staggered, Automaton unleashed all the magic it had at its disposal.
Countless magic magics scorched the entire radius.
Having exhausted all its available energy, Pascal emitted a strange noise before coming to a halt.
As the smoke cleared, Shirone was revealed, clutching one shoulder.
A moment later, his knees buckled, and he finally collapsed onto the ground.

blocks.speaker: Alpheas
blocks.content: This time, Shirone has fallen.

blocks.speaker: Alpheas
blocks.content: Incredible.
Even Alpheas couldn't help but be impressed this time.
The Pascal parallel magic circles and the three-dimensional mansion that strengthened its power.
Dante's system, which even had automated functions of Automaton, was comparable to a work of art that had reached the pinnacle of functional art.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Is he using binary?
Olivia was silent.
But that was enough for Alpheas to realize.
It was clear now—Dante was indeed using binary.

blocks.speaker: Alpheas
blocks.content: Since when… did Dante learn the language of dragons?
A smile formed on Olivia's lips.
If Alpheas was already certain, there was no longer a need to hide it.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: So what? Dragon speech magic uses a binary system, but it's not exclusively the domain of dragons.

blocks.speaker: Alpheas
blocks.content: Humans can understand binary. But wielding binary as a language is a completely different matter.
Alpheas suddenly realized.

blocks.speaker: Alpheas
blocks.content: Could it be… he was born with it?

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: I didn't believe it at first either. But it's true. Just like Shirone's insight or Iruki's Savant Syndrome, Dante was born with the ability to process information.
Olivia recalled the first time she met Dante ten years ago.
At that time, she was serving as the principal of the Royal Magic Academy when an invitation to a tea party arrived from the social gathering of Bashka.
The host was Bianca, the matron of Airhein Family.
There were six people in total, and all of them, except Olivia, were married women.

blocks.speaker: Bianca
blocks.content: It's really troubling. Our youngest son recently took a leave of absence from the academy and came back home.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Oh my, but isn't Dante known as an exemplary student? Did something happen at the academy?
Bianca shook her head with a dark face.

blocks.speaker: Bianca
blocks.content: I don't know. He hasn't been talking to me lately. He came to me with bruises on his face, saying he got into a fight with his friends at the academy. From what I could gather, it seemed like several kids had ganged up on him.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Well, it's not a common occurrence, but it is a phenomenon when a child awakens to something at a young age. No, it's more of a psychological factor than a phenomenon. It happens when their existing understanding of the world collapses, and they start seeing the world differently. They usually experience intense fear as a result.

blocks.speaker: Bianca
blocks.content: Are you saying my son is ill?
A cold sweat ran down Olivia's spine.
A wrong answer here could not only ruin her reputation in high society but also leave her embroiled in gossip for a long time.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: No. It's not a disease. It's something that often appears in geniuses. There are quite a few children like that at the magic academy.

blocks.speaker: Bianca
blocks.content: Haah, so I ended up dropping him out of the academy and taking him home. But what's worrying is that he sits in the garden all day, just staring at the ground. When I asked him why, he wouldn't give me an answer. I'm just left watching him.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Really, is our Dante really a genius? Hmm… It does seem possible. He's had an extraordinary side to him since he was young. Of course, genius kids tend to be ostracized by their peers. That must be why Dante didn't socialize with his friends.
Olivia wanted to go home.
She couldn't bring herself to tell Bianca that it was just a possibility.

blocks.speaker: Bianca
blocks.content: Would it be possible… for you to meet with Dante?

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Pardon? Right now?
Bianca, known as the fox of the social scene, surely understood Olivia's hesitation.

blocks.speaker: Bianca
blocks.content: Please. Miss Olivia is the principal of the Royal Magic Academy. I'm sure you'll be able to uncover Dante's hidden talents. He's in the garden of the annex right now.
With the situation as it was, Olivia had no choice but to agree.
She sighed and got up, but not before making sure to protect herself just in case.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Understood. I'll speak with him, but don't jump to conclusions. If it truly is Overflow, it's something that will require a lot of time and careful guidance.

blocks.speaker: Bianca
blocks.content: Yes, yes, please take good care of him.
Olivia then made her way to the annex to meet the student she had never seen before.
As expected from a family ranked 20th in the Thormia financial world, the annex was as big as any other noble's mansion.
An expansive lawn filled with the scent of spring was laid out like a playground, and beyond that was a deep forest.
Dante was sitting at the entrance to the forest.
Olivia observed the boy from a distance and sighed once again.
Perhaps, as the noblewoman had suggested, he was simply entering puberty early.
However, Olivia was convinced it was Overflow.
It was an instinct honed from 20 years of teaching experience.
